title: gladiolus murielae
intro: Gladiolus murielae, commonly known as the Mongolian gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus murielae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
